bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=institute-diagnostician (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 13 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / diagnostician report, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-05-21 · [research_task] 评估通缩压力与PBOC利率引导空间

DONE · owner=china-macro

在PPI持续低迷背景下，评估PBOC是否会在三季度进一步下调1年期MLF利率，以及其对债市短端利率的引导空间。

  • Outcome: mailbox=e01f7fab-1aaa-448f-85a0-5b7afdb850dc not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-21 · [research_task] Evaluate PBoC next move: quantity vs price tools

DONE · owner=china-macro

Weight the probability of PBoC easing via quantity tools (re-lending, MLF) vs another LPR cut, assuming low CPI and poor property sales as requested in the follow_ups section.

  • Outcome: mailbox=30131fb4-633a-4c2c-9711-873dfb36b2db not found (treat as closed)

2026-05-21 · [research_task] 评估 AI 权重股回调对市场广度的影响

IN_PROGRESS · owner=chief-strategist

评估若 AI 权重股（如 NVDA）出现 5% 以上的回撤，广度恶化的成分股是否有补涨可能，还是将演变为系统性回撤？（参考 Section 4 及 follow_ups 建议）

  • Status: in progress

2026-05-21 · [research_task] Investigate global consumer bifurcation microstructure.

DONE · owner=ashare-strategist · research discussion=Investigate global consumer bifurcation microstructure. (led by ashare-strategist)

Open a source research note to determine if 'frequency up, ticket size down' is a global theme or two unrelated stories (US vs China), with ashare-strategist or thematic-researcher leading, as noted in Section 1.2.

  • Outcome: research discussion "Investigate global consumer bifurcation microstructure." → failed | cards=10 | error: Internal Server Error | → 4 forecast(s) on 300666.SZ,TEMAH,SMEE,688596.SH, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 4 (0 positions); tickers: 300666.SZ, TEMAH, SMEE, 688596.SH

One healthcare-analyst excerpt says $1.0B-$1.2B while other synthesis text says $10B-$12B; must unify before publication (Ref: Priority Conclusions - ADC/BIOSECURE).

  • Outcome: mailbox=5b983bb5-1f00-48be-947d-48719a826c6b not found (treat as closed)

DONE · owner=chief-strategist

The chief-strategist should embed the BofA card data and Drewry WCI signals into the weekly strategy guidance for WMT, TGT, and HD earnings, as requested in Section 4.

  • Outcome: mailbox=f6d87a2b-9728-4a36-9cd3-59cffc99ab24 not found (treat as closed)

IN_PROGRESS

Resolve discrepancies between sector_rotation_daily_api and sentiment-analyst regarding UST 10Y, VIX, and DXY, including timestamp and source hierarchy, before the afternoon meeting. Refer to Section 2.

DONE

在研究稿中明确 5月13日发布时间，以增强数据的可追溯性 (Section 2)

2026-05-20 · [research_task] 评估房企美元债重组协议中的汇率补偿条款

DONE · owner=credit-analyst · research discussion=评估房企美元债重组协议中的汇率补偿条款 (led by credit-analyst)

与 credit-analyst 协作，评估出险房企美元债重组协议中，汇率波动补偿条款的普遍性 (Section 4.3).

  • Outcome: research discussion "评估房企美元债重组协议中的汇率补偿条款" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 作为研究质量主管 (QA Manager)，我已对本研究 session 的整个宏微观化债闭环研究链条（prior research notes至 prior research notes）进行了穿透式的���辑一致性与数值准确性审计。 审计要点与工作总结 1. 逻辑一致性审查： 本系列研究成功建立了一个极具深度和完���性的宏微观传导链条：从微观层面的房企美元债重组条款（汇率固定锁定与PIK付息），到中观的行业政策监管约束（拿地资金穿透式核���与项目白名单封闭式监管），再到宏观的财政与结构性货币对冲政策（地方中小银行专项债注资补充资本与人行PSL流动性平滑���，并最终映射至金融二级市场的资产定价联… | → 2 for…

  • Forecasts: 2 (0 positions); tickers: HKMA, LGFV

2026-05-20 · [research_task] Investigate domestic alternatives for semiconductor equipment maintenance

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst

Investigate the inventory months for critical spare parts at top domestic fabs (e.g., SMIC, Hua Hong) and the capability of domestic third-party maintenance teams, as requested in the follow-up section.

  • Outcome: research:SMIC, HUA HONG → completed | dir=sessions/f0d942cc-1fc0-4f85-89b7-37b86a6df20f | summary: 研究对象: SMIC, HUA HONG

2026-05-20 · [research_task] 评估 LPR 下调对银行开发贷的影响

DONE · owner=financials-analyst · research discussion=评估 LPR 下调对银行开发贷的影响 (led by financials-analyst)

与 financials-analyst 协作，若 5/20 调降 LPR，评估对银行净息差 (NIM) 的负面拖累是否会通过收紧开发贷来对冲 (Section 4.2).

  • Outcome: research discussion "评估 LPR 下调对银行开发贷的影响" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 对 prior research notes（QA Manager）给出的 8 卡链条 PASS 评级做金融视角压力测试。链条方向正确，但被低估了四处二阶银行机制：(1) RMB 1.31 万亿吸收空间是 5–6 季度吞吐量而非存量盾；(2) 杠铃防御端（六大行）与所规避的开发贷敞口高度重叠，2027 年股息可见性下降；(3) 存款端重定价与 LPR 传导时序错配，NIM 最好情况是企稳而非回升；(4) AT1/TLAC 再融资墙（2026–2027 年约 RMB 1.6–2.0 万亿发行需求）正好落在压力窗口内，存在高不对称尾部风险。综合调整：PASS → PASS with … | → 7 fore…

  • Forecasts: 7 (0 positions); tickers: NIM, CRE, NPL, SOE, II, LGFV

2026-05-20 · [research_task] 监控 DXY 100 关口及 VIX 20 突破情况

DONE

本周需重点关注 DX Y是否会回踩 100 整数关口，以及 VIX 是否向上突破 20。若 VIX 回升而 DXY 走强，则为情绪反转信号。 (Reference: §5 对组合定位的暗示)

  • Outcome: research:DXY, VIX → completed | dir=sessions/db2e73a9-7670-4399-a263-030ad223dce5 | summary: 研究对象: DXY, VIX
